programme.title: Shoot That Ball

programme.title: Sitsit
programme.desc: An aging photographer seeks the powers of an ancient Chinese potion and turns into a hunk of a man to win the love of a young maiden; A woman with very little means adopts a stray dog who transforms into an Aswang to protect her from danger.

programme.title: Patapon

programme.title: Ganda Babae, Ganda Lalake

programme.title: Soltera
programme.desc: Sandra hastily gets into a relationship with Eric due to her fear of being single and alone. However, their age difference complicates their union.

programme.title: Medal of Valor

programme.title: Pak! Pak! My Dr. Kwak!

programme.title: The Titan Games S2
programme.desc: The competition moves to the Eastern Region as new competitors push their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host and executive producer Dwayne Johnson. In this episode, competitors will compete in a best of three competition where the winner will move on to battle a Pro-Athlete Titan on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The top female competitor will face Olympic gold-medal winning snowboarder Hannah Teter, while the top man will advance to compete against five-time UFC champion Tyron Woodley. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.desc: Jung-ha's peaceful life changes when her son Jin-woo, who studies in Canada, and his girlfriend Jenny show up. They are forced to live together after a mishap with their lodging, and secrets surface.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: Three lifelong friends get wrapped up in a robbery-arson case. Suspicious of the investigation and the police, Hyun-tae starts digging for the truth himself and asks his best friend for help.

programme.title: The King's Letters
programme.desc: King Sejong desires to create an original alphabet for his people. With the help of others, they struggle to create the Korean alphabet Hangul.

programme.title: Killing Romance
programme.desc: As a popular actress has growing discontentment towards her marriage, she begins planning to kill her rich husband with her neighbor.

programme.title: Pilot
programme.desc: Han Jung-woo. a star pilot suffers a drastic fall due to a momentary mistake was blacklisted from all airline. In a desperate bid for survival, he adopts a new identity as his younger sister and manages to find re-employment, yet this newfound stability is soon threatened...

programme.title: The Glorious my Revenge
programme.desc: Detective Ryu lost his beloved son in a hit-and-run accident. As the statute of limitations passed without finding the criminal, he ran into the murderer of his son.

programme.title: Noryang: Deadly Sea
programme.desc: In the last battle of Yi Sun-Sin in 1598, he fought against the Japanese army and intertwined with the Ming dynasty, bringing the 7-year Japanese invasions of Korea to an end...

programme.title: One Win
programme.desc: Woo-jin is the newly appointed manager of a girls' volleyball team which is going to disband. The new owner sold all ace players for money and asked the team to win at least once.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Alex is mistaken for a Maine Coon and takes over that cat’s life in the penthouse. At first, VERY comfortable with his shmancy new life, Alex grows to miss his old life and learns that it’s lonely at the top.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: On Junior Marshals’ Day at the fire station, Melman gets stuck in a firetruck on its way to a real emergency. With Alex’s help, Melman must overcome his fear of heights to help save a stuck cat, and learn that even heroes get scared sometimes.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Aggro is embarrassed about big changes she's going through. And when she gets stuck in a volcano, the Rescue Riders seek help from ... Magnus?

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When a mama Ironclaw dragon gets caught high on a mountain with a broken wing, Hannahr the blacksmith has to confront her fear of heights to help out.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: When Sherman tells a lie, Peabody wants to teach him that honesty is the best policy but discovers it's nearly impossible to always tell the truth

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: When Sherman invites Johnny Appleseed to the show to grow a forest and build his dream treehouse, Peabody tries to prevent a chaotic woodland invasion

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Jun breaks the rules by sneaking a small, adorable dragon out of the Crystal Realm and bringing it home, but finds that her older brother, Eugene, has arrived and watches her every move.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom has to keep his mom, Olivia, distracted while Jun, Alex, and D’Angelo use a new dragon to close off a cave leading to the Crystal Realm, and prevent her from discovering the dragons.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Julien hires Croc Ambassador, an etiquette expert, to teach the kingdom how to behave at a classy ball, but everyone is too uptight to party

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: When King Julien gets sick, Mort must attend the Best Kingdom of Madagascar Award ceremony and comes back to find a Queen has taken his place

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Puss is terrified by an invasion by a swarm of bees, which only the hippy-like “Piper” can control with her magic flute.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Just as Puss is training the orphans to protect San Lorenzo, El Moco storms into town and cat-naps the swashbuckling hero.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When a distant cousin of the Twins named Gruffnut arrives on Dragon's Edge, Tuffnut tries to impress him, but Gruffnut may not be the hero he seems.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Viggo puts a bounty on Hiccup's head, every Dragon Hunter in the world is after capturing Hiccup, so Toothless and the Riders must rescue him.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Snotlout screws up a mission, he must learn to be a leader and earn the trust of the other riders.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Eep loves action and adventure - it's in her blood. But when Eep starts adventuring in her sleep, she has to try to find the cause of her new sleep walking to avoid ending up in dangerous situations.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: After Thunk and Guy tell Eep and Dawn a campfire story of Gorgwatch, a hideous monster who roams the woods, the girls are terrified. After a sleepless night, Guy and Thunk assure the girls it's just a made up story. Dawn and Eep are relieved until they find proof that Gorgwatch is real... and he's coming for them.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Guy invents a primitive skateboard, Eep and Dawn have a blast trying new tricks. But when the punch monkeys want to take over the girl's awesome new skate spot, Dawn and the punch monkeys enter a skate-off to win back the skate canyon once and for all.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby is framed for leaking info about the Stinkless Serum to PuppyCo and must flee on the run via Errand Day with the family

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Frederic makes a play to take over the town's babysitters by instituting "senior sitting"

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Frederic Estes creates the cutest plushy ever that is the hottest toy in town, the field team must destroy the last remaining one but are powerless against its cuteness

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: After a fight with her mom, Jun joins Tom on an adventure into the Fire Realm, where the knowledge of myths saves the day.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: When a tiny Fireworm dragon ends up at ICARIS, Alex has to decide between her moms’ excitement and keeping the dragon secret.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: During an attempt to get displaced Fire Gronckles back to their native Fire Realm, D’Angelo makes a mistake by accidentally feeding them Catastrophic Quaken eggs.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade rush to warn the Emperor about the weasels, but he has Po arrested and Colin captures Blade, revealing that she was never a knight. Thrown in a cell, Po reunites with Rukhmini and Mr. Ping, and he copes with the truth about Blade as they break out. Po fights Klaus and Veruca but is outmatched. Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The team realizes they can’t stop Dann on their own, so they call in Ms. Nowhere for backup. While they try to come up with a game plan, Dann ambushes them! It’s a knock-down-drag-out brawl all through Los Gatos as they try to keep Dann from getting the mysterious devices she’s collecting. In their time of need, they turn to the last person they ever thought they’d ask for help: Cleve Kelso.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Dann is using her resonator devices to set off a chain reaction, causing a massive earthquake and sending L.A. into the ocean. The Spy Racers stage a last stand at the final location Dann needs to go: an oil refinery on the Channel Islands. This is their final mission to save their city, and they can’t do it alone. So they decide to call in some old friends for backup.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: With Dann captured, the team returns to L.A. as Echo, Nowhere, Gary and Julius oversee the removal of Dann’s corrupt AI software. Everyone is excited to attend the premiere of Limo 3: The Stretchening! Everyone except for Tony, who misses the action and is feeling a little lost now that he’s not a Spy Racer anymore. But he may get his wish when things don’t go exactly as planned and Dann is rebooted – along with a few more cyber-enhanced super soldiers!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: As the countdown to the Eternal Night approaches, Jim is enlightened in the truth about himself.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Jim's friends discover the Trollhunter has gone through a transformation, Jim will test his newly gained abilities.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The Eternal Night covers Arcadia in shadow leading to a long awaited fight between the Trollhunter and Gunmar130226

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel travel into their parents’ memories in pursuit of Morando – and the truth about Gaylen’s Core. But when the King and Queen’s lives are jeopardized, a trusted ally makes a sacrifice that will change the team forever.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With their parents nearly regenerated and Morando in pursuit of Gaylen’s Core, Aja, Krel, and Vex unite with Toby and Arrgh on a quest into the depths of Trollmarket to unearth the relic before it ends up in the wrong hands.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Armed with the power of Gaylen's Core, Morando's forces attack Arcadia as the Royals fight to protect their lives and their adopted Earth home.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms. Nowhere’s mission – what could Cleve be up to in the desert?

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or “The Dead End,” in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom. The crew manages to steal a few of the dune buggies and take off into the desert! Meanwhile, Rafaela and Matsuo bust into a secret military base and steal an important piece of tech for Cleve.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: In an awesome chase/battle through the desert, the crew goes up against Rafaela, Matsuo, and Sandocal – who are driving the kids’ own cars. The crew struggles to fight back while also not losing the trail to Cleve’s base in the desert. When Rafaela turns on Sandocal, he and Layla decide to work together and manage to overpower Rafaela and Matsuo. Sandocal tells the kids to go to escape toward the Bedouin Shield.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: To escape big trouble, the Dinotrux quickly put together a raft and hit the sea. But there might be danger lurking in the water, too.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Ring My Bell When Casper encourages Quasi to go on strike from his thankless job as chore boy, Alder and Dash make Casper take his place. First Mate Casper When Cappy needs a first mate, Casper's the only one who's up to the challenge.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Power Outage – Part 1: A Powerful Foe When Scare School falls victim to the Baccora, Kibosh encourages the students to work together, setting booby-traps and building defences. Power Outage – Part 2: Razznik's Revenge Creature by creature, the evil entity, Baccora, robs Scare School of its powers and locks them into a magical cleptor.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: RUPERT wants to play with RAGGETY. But Raggety has to work - MOTHER NATURE needs him to plant seedlings. Rupert decides to make Raggety's life easier, and discovers Ping Pong has some magic seeds for flowers that grow really easily, no watering or pruning required. Rupert and Raggety scatter these seeds across Nutwood, head off to have fun. But the flowers turn out to be Snoozeflowers: their perfume sends everyone to sleep. Rupert's plan for Raggety doing less work has backfired – Nutwood is going to become a place where nothing's done at all, because everyone's sleeping. Luckily, it's revealed that rain will wash the snooze away, and Rupert takes Raggety up to the top of the lighthouse so he can make rainstorms, rescue Nutwood from sleepiness. They get down to gardening together!

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert and his friends have fun making puppet versions of themselves. They are amazed when the puppets appear to come alive and run away, forcing the friends to pursue them all over Nutwood.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When one of Rikki’s plants won't sing, Pixie and Juniper both tell their varying recollections of why the plant is suddenly silent. / Kelp, Scallop, and Cruz have always thought that starfish did nothing but laze about; but as they go about their day, the starfish goes through his own routine, completely unbeknownst to everyone else.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Leroy must learn to let go when his caterpillar friend turns into a butterfly. / When Pixie loses her spark, Kelp and Juniper look for the plant they think will cure her. Meanwhile Pixie wonders whether she can be cured at all!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Game Show Day in the dollhouse! Our wily and well-groomed host, CatRat, leads Gabby and Pandy around the dollhouse, where they compete in Gab-ified games, like Tushy Tunes on the “butt xylophone” couch and a cooking competition of Bakey with Cakey. They win tickets and trade them in for prizes at the end.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a pirate treasure map in the shape of the dollhouse (a piece of it has been torn off). This must mean it’s time for a pirate treasure hunt in the dollhouse! Pirate Gabby and Pirate Pandy head out on their journey across the many “lands” of the dollhouse to find the Gabby Cats Treasure!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: During the Lunar New Year festival, Alex is bummed to learn that there's no Year of the Lion. Determined to be somebody important, he sets out to become the star of the festival by taking on the role of the Dragon- but he eventually learns that every role has importance, and realizes the costume that fits him best is his own fur.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Lala, who's grown into a froglet, is ready to finally join the gang on a big adventure in the city! But she relies on her water bowl to get around, and Gloria goes overboard in trying to protect her tiny friend in the big world- only to realize that she underestimated all Lala is capable of doing.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When one of Rikki’s plants won't sing, Pixie and Juniper both tell their varying recollections of why the plant is suddenly silent. / Kelp, Scallop, and Cruz have always thought that starfish did nothing but laze about; but as they go about their day, the starfish goes through his own routine, completely unbeknownst to everyone else.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Leroy must learn to let go when his caterpillar friend turns into a butterfly. / When Pixie loses her spark, Kelp and Juniper look for the plant they think will cure her. Meanwhile Pixie wonders whether she can be cured at all!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When the crew takes on a mission to help Ian get some rest for a Badminton Tournament, Jax realises that the biggest approach isn't always the best approach. / When Lula loses her comic book, Ari learns that the best heroes rely on teamwork and not gadgets.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When a pesky gopher gets in the way of Fawna making her famous veggie stew, Niah learns to not let a bad experience, get in the way of doing good. / When the inexperienced Rona has to step in for Donna, the team makes sure everyone has the best camping trip ever.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Marty accidentally “steals” a pair of slippers from a department store, he plans an elaborate “heist” to return them and learns in the end that it’s easier to own up to your mistakes than to cover them up.

programme.title: Six Singles Under One Roof
programme.desc: Six single celebrities in their 40s choose co-living in Gugi-dong as “Life Mates,” sharing laughter, challenges, and fresh memories while redefining modern family through friendship.

programme.title: Mad Concrete Dreams
programme.desc: Upon achieving the coveted status of a landlord, mounting debts lead Soo-Jong into participating a staged kidnapping, yet the plan spirals out of control as the fake kidnapping turns dangerously real.

programme.title: Mad Concrete Dreams
programme.desc: Upon achieving the coveted status of a landlord, mounting debts lead Soo-Jong into participating a staged kidnapping, yet the plan spirals out of control as the fake kidnapping turns dangerously real.

programme.title: KILL IT: Style Creator Showdown
programme.desc: 100 women compete in this high-stakes survival show to become the next global K-fashion icon.

programme.desc: Lee Je-hoon, Lee Dong-hwi, Cha Eun-woo, and Kwak Dong-yeon will leave their urban lives behind to experience the serene and picturesque rural life in Finland.

programme.title: Chansung's Cooking
programme.desc: 2PM’s Chansung will explore different restaurants, taste popular menus and recreate them with his own recipes!

programme.desc: Three chefs, joined by their manager and assistant, travel to Hong Kong for inspiration. In this cultural crossroads, they meet remarkable people, discover new stories, and create fresh “recipes for life".

programme.desc: Top celebrity chefs go undercover as a junior kitchen staff in the very country that shaped their culinary roots, challenge to earn recognition from locals in 5 days!

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)
programme.desc: In the definitive guide, miners reveal exactly where to find gold all over the world, from creeks to glaciers and even on beaches.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S2)
programme.desc: Dave and Cody take on the survival scenario of two castaways adrift at sea and show how to survive being stranded on a deserted jungle island in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Jaws Vs Mega Croc
programme.desc: Using data from new experiments, experts construct a CGI fight to the death between two apex predators: the great white shark and Nile crocodile.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)
programme.desc: Duncan talks Ant into buying a 1991 BMW 30 325i, convinced there's profit to be made. Meanwhile, Ant races to finish the hallway of the farmhouse.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen (S2)
programme.desc: Jared and crew race against time to move enough wood to water to win the Holy Grail of logging claims and secure Cypress Creek’s legacy forever.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing The Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: Otto explores the culture of the indigenous Yvyrhareta population. They prepare natural medicines and participate in the traditional fire dance.

programme.title: Ed Stafford's Rite Of Passage (S1)
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Ed must wrestle the giant heirs of Genghis Khan to become a man. He takes part in the annual rite of passage festival, Naadam.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters (S8)
programme.desc: The Mooka Boys face the new season without chief mechanic Leif Tanzer. Plus, Opal thieves have ransacked The Bushmen’s claim.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (b) (S13)
programme.desc: The weather is turning, and it's become 'make or break' time for many miners in the fleet.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)
programme.desc: Ant finds a 1929 Austin 7, but it has brake issues, poor lights, and a surprise fault. Plus, the deadline to finish the house restoration looms.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S4)
programme.desc: Joe sets off on a mission to locate his new partner, who is on an uninhabited island off the coast of Panama.

programme.title: Fritz Meinecke - Facing The Unknown (S1)
programme.desc: Adventurer Fritz Meineck ventures into remote regions of the world to complete seemingly impossible challenges, with no outside help and limited equipment.

programme.title: Ed Stafford's Rite Of Passage (S1)
programme.desc: Ed travels to the Ecuadorian rainforest to meet the Waorani, hunting monkeys and crocodiles, and making poison blow-darts.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen (S2)
programme.desc: Jared and crew race to maximize his bid for the Forever Claim and protect Cypress Creek’s future from the competition.

programme.desc: Ami challenges the Wolfpack to step out of their comfort zone. They must take on something they've always wanted to experience outside of the bush.

programme.title: Cat People
programme.desc: Nastassja Kinski stars in this erotic fantasy about a beautiful young woman who discovers love for the first time, only to find that the explosive experience brings tragic consequences.

programme.title: Batman Begins
programme.desc: After witnessing his parents' death, billionaire Bruce Wayne learns the art of fighting to confront injustice. When he returns to Gotham as Batman, he must stop a secret society that intends to destroy the city.

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Julia Roberts and Mel Gibson team up for the first time in this taut thriller of a beautiful Justice Department attorney entangled in a paranoid cab driver's Conspiracy Theory.

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto kung paano gumamit ng magagalang na pananalita, pagsasabi ng mensahe, paksa o tema ng patalastas at kuwento. Alamin din ang pagsusulat ng parirala at pangungusap.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Learn about whole numbers up to 1000, ordinal numbers up to 10th, money up to Php100, and how to perform addition of whole numbers up to 1000 including money.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Learn the alphabet, discover different sounds, elements of the story, action words, and how to use proper and common nouns, along with "a" and "an".

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa kahalagahan ng kinabibilangang komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Talakayin ang mga pangngalan, panghalip, iba't ibang bahagi ng aklat, diksyunaryo, at elemento ng kuwento. Alamin rin ang pagbabasa at pagbabaybay ng mga salita.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Learn about whole numbers up to 10 000, ordinal numbers up to 100th, money up to PhP1000, and how to perform addition and subtraction to whole numbers, including money.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Discover different kinds of sentences, descriptive paragraphs, and diaries, as well as where to use common and proper nouns, plural forms of regular and irregular nouns, and how to read words with short vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kinalalagyan ng mga lalawigan sa rehiyong kinabibilangan ayon sa katangiang heograpikal nito.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Find out ways of sorting materials and how to describe them as solid, liquid or gas based on observable properties.

programme.title: Grade 5 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto ng wastong paggamit ng mga pangngalan at mga panghalip at aralin kung paano magbigay ng kahulugan ng mga salita, tukuyin ang mga elemento ng kuwento at sagutin ang mga tanong tungkol dito.

programme.title: Grade 5 Math
programme.desc: Learn about divisibility, order of operations, factors and multiples, and the four fundamental operations involving fractions.

programme.title: Grade 5 English
programme.desc: Know how to fill out forms, infer the meaning of words, and compose coherent sentences.

programme.title: Grade 5 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Pag-usapan ang heograpiya at teorya sa pinagmulan ng lahing Pilipino upang mapahalagahan ang konteksto ng lipunan ng mga sinaunang Pilipino at ang kanilang ambag sa kasaysayan ng Pilipinas.

programme.title: Grade 5 Science
programme.desc: Differentiate the useful and harmful properties of materials, and learn how they can change due to oxygen and heat.

programme.title: Grade 8 Filipino
programme.desc: Matutong sumuri at magsulat ng tula, bugtong, sawikain, talata, karunungang-bayan, at pananaliksik.

programme.title: Grade 8 Math
programme.desc: Be informed of the key concepts of factors of polynomials, rational algebraic expressions, linear equations and inequalities in two variables, systems of linear equations and inequalities in two variables and linear functions.

programme.title: Grade 8 English
programme.desc: See how to use modals, adverbs, adjectives, nouns, how to cite sources, and determine the meaning of words and expressions.

programme.title: Grade 8 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Aralin ang interaksyon ng tao sa kaniyang kapaligiran na nagpa-usbong ng mga sinaunang kabihasnan na nagbigay pamana sa kasalukuyang henerasyon.

programme.title: Grade 8 Science
programme.desc: Learn about Newton’s three laws of motion, force, power, and different kinds of energy and know more about the propagation of sound, the properties of visible light, heat and temperature, electricity, and the effects of heat on the body.

programme.title: Preschool | ECCD
programme.desc: Learn and appreciate the Creator and the Creations, Communication, Cooperation, Relationship, Sense of Purpose

programme.title: Kindergarten
programme.desc: Learn about letters, body parts and their uses, and objects in the environment with their properties.

programme.title: Grade 1 Language
programme.desc: Matuto kung paano gumamit ng malaki at maliit na titik, mga pangngalan, at tamang pagbasa ng mga salita. Magsuri rin ng mga pabula, tugma, tula, balita, at kuwento.

programme.title: Grade 1 Math
programme.desc: Learn about whole numbers up to 100, ordinal numbers up to 10th, money up to PhP100.

programme.title: Grade 1 Reading & Literacy
programme.desc: Discover rhyming words, greetings and leave-takings, and the different elements of a story.

programme.title: Grade 1 Makabansa
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng pagkilala sa sarili bilang Pilipino gamit ang konsepto ng pagpapatuloy at pagbabago.

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino

programme.desc: After Megan Khung’s tragic case, Singapore has strengthened its child protection system to close gaps and act faster. Consumed by guilt, Meera spirals into paranoia, haunted by disturbing visions of looming danger.

programme.desc: A pacey and action filled drama the story takes a look at the winners of this golden era. Not able to handle the jeering and bullying by the boys from the Kampong he happens to burst out in violence and injures the head boy double his size!
